summary: COMPREHENSIVE TEST PASSED - All 29 backend tests passed (19 iteration15 + 10 strip_emotion_markers). Frontend UI verified: Landing page, Chat flow with Miron voice, thinking dot animation, no green status dot, responsive design (mobile/tablet/desktop). AI responses have NO emotion markers visible to users.
critical_code_review_comments: strip_emotion_markers() in chat.py correctly removes Fish Audio markers (calm), (soft tone), (warm)(gentle), (sighing), (thoughtful) from AI responses
EMOTION_MARKER_RE regex preserves legitimate parenthetical content like (Иван) and (бесплатный телефон доверия)
ChatHeader.jsx correctly shows pulsating cyan thinking dot (.xc-chat-thinking-dot) only when isBusy=true
No static green dot (.xc-status-online) exists on avatar borders
Multi-language support working: ru/en/es/de responses verified
Ethical filter triggers for crisis messages with hotline mention
TTS endpoint returns audio/mpeg content correctly
STT endpoint has LANG_MAP for 8 languages (ru/en/zh/es/ar/fr/de/hi)
seed_data_creation: Guest users created during tests for isolation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified all requested features: (1) AI responses have NO emotion markers like (calm)(soft tone) visible to users - strip_emotion_markers() working correctly; (2) Multi-language chat responses verified for ru/en/es/de; (3) Pulsating cyan thinking dot appears on active avatar during loading/TTS - no static green dot; (4) Landing page CSS and voice_config.py are LOCKED and working; (5) Ethical filter triggers for crisis messages; (6) Responsive design works on mobile (375x667), tablet (768x1024), desktop (1920x1080).
